sourcesContent:
// components/OfficeForm.jsx import React from "react"; import { Form } from "react-bootstrap"; function OfficeForm({ office, setOffice, errors, officelevels, reportingoffice, states, district, selectedOfficeLevel, setSelectedOfficeLevel, selectedReportingOffice, setSelectedReportingOffice, selectedState, setSelectedState, selectedDistrict, setSelectedDistrict, loadReportingOffice, loadDistrict, handleSaveConfirmation, handleReset }) { const updateSelected = (field, value) => { setSelectedValues((prev) => ({ ...prev, [field]: value, })); }; return (
{office.action === "U" ? "Update Office" : "Add New Office"}
1. General Details
setOffice({ ...office, office_name: e.target.value }) } />
{errors.office_name}
setOffice({ ...office, office_name_local: e.target.value }) } />
{errors.office_level_id}
{errors.reporting_office_id}
2. Contact Details
setOffice({ ...office, address: e.target.value }) } />
{errors.state_id}
{errors.district_id}
{ const value = e.target.value.replace(/\D/g, "").slice(0, 15); setOffice({ ...office, mobile: value }) }} />
{errors.mobile}
setOffice({ ...office, email: e.target.value }) } />
{errors.email}
3. Nodal Officer Details
setOffice({ ...office, nodel_name: e.target.value }) } />
{ const value = e.target.value.replace(/\D/g, "").slice(0, 10); setOffice({ ...office, nodel_mobile:value }) }} />
{errors.nodel_mobile}
setOffice({ ...office, nodel_email: e.target.value }) } />
{errors.nodel_email}
  
); } export default OfficeForm;
